Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to support Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 features or compatibility; the old JDK 11 image does not provide the target runtime environment.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package manager (apt-get) with Alpine package manager (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which uses apk instead of apt-get; using apt-get would fail at build time.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install bash explicitly as it is not included by default in the minimal Alpine image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Subsequent steps or scripts may rely on bash; the Alpine base image often lacks bash by default, causing command not found errors.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Maven explicitly since the new base image does not include it.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process requires Maven to compile the Java application; the old image had it pre-installed, but the new Alpine JDK image does not.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or its dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Some Java libraries or native components may require libstdc++ at runtime; missing this on Alpine can cause UnsatisfiedLinkError or similar runtime failures.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace the NodeSource setup script and apt-based Node.js installation with nvm-based installation for Node.js 16.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous method relied on Debian-specific repositories and apt; the new Alpine environment requires a different installation method (nvm) to get Node.js.
Dockerfile.before: RUN apt-get install -y curl && curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_12.x | bash - && curl https://cli-assets.heroku.com/install-ubuntu.sh | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, potentially missing Java 21 features or causing compatibility warnings/errors in a JDK 21 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); using it causes compilation errors or runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC version to 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud versions are incompatible with Spring Boot 3, leading to dependency resolution failures or runtime class conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation dependency to bridge legacy validation API usage during migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code referencing javax.validation may fail to compile or run if the API is not explicitly provided, as it was removed from the JDK and moved to Jakarta EE.
